source_intake_record.raw_question_text: An ideal MOS capacitor (p-type semiconductor) is shown in the figure. The MOS capacitor is under strong inversion with \( V_G = 2V \). The corresponding inversion charge density \( Q_{IN} \) is \( 2.2 \, \mu C/cm^2 \). Assume oxide capacitance per unit area as \( C_{OX} = 1.7 \, \mu F/cm^2 \). For \( V_G = 4V \), the value of \( Q_{IN} \) is _____ \( \mu C/cm^2 \) (rounded off to one decimal place).
extraction_notes: Answer field is an option letter; mapped to corresponding choice text.
Image field contains an in-memory PIL image object, not a path or URL.
